positive: Minimalist geometric owl silhouette, perched on a stylized crescent moon, surrounded by subtle constellations and star trails. The design uses clean, bold linework and solid negative space elements. Color palette is muted celestial blue, deep navy, cream, and metallic gold accents. Composition is perfectly centered and highly scalable. Print on apparel style, suitable for single-color screen printing or distressed ink. Highly symmetrical, modern, kawaii aesthetic, vector art style, deep contrast, isolated on a white background.
